question_text: A car travels 120 m in 8 seconds, then immediately travels a further 180 m in 12 seconds. Which statement correctly compares the two parts of the journey?

options.label: A
options.text: The first part was faster because it covered less distance.

options.label: B
options.text: The first part was faster because the average speed was 15 m/s compared to 15 m/s in the second part.

options.label: C
options.text: The first part was faster because the average speed was 15 m/s compared to 15 m/s in the second part.

options.label: D
options.text: Both parts had the same average speed of 15 m/s.

explanation: First part: 120 ÷ 8 = 15 m/s. Second part: 180 ÷ 12 = 15 m/s. Although the distances and times are different, dividing distance by time shows both sections had equal average speeds.
